question-bank-backed/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the project's target Java version from 1.8 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Add JAXB API and runtime dependencies which were removed from the JDK standard library starting in Java 11.
Update the Maven compiler plugin configuration to explicitly target Java 21 source and target levels.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'SampleProject' to 'QuestionBank' to reflect the new application identity.
Introduce MapStruct dependencies and processor configuration for type-safe bean mapping.
Explicitly define the Lombok version property for consistent dependency management.
Add the Spring Boot Web starter dependency to enable web application capabilities.
Add the Spring Boot Thymeleaf starter dependency for server-side HTML templating.
Add the Spring Boot Validation starter dependency for bean validation support.
Add the Swagger UI dependency to provide a web interface for API documentation.
Add Flying Saucer and Thymeleaf Spring 5 dependencies for PDF generation capabilities.
Add Docx4j dependencies for creating and manipulating Word documents.
Add Apache POI and XMLBeans dependencies for Excel file processing.
Add JasperReports dependencies for advanced reporting and PDF generation.
Add Spring Boot DevTools dependency to enable automatic restarts and live reload during development.
Add explicit SLF4J API dependency for logging abstraction.
Add ICU4J dependency for enhanced Unicode and international text support.
Add JLaTeXMath dependency for rendering mathematical symbols.
Explicitly configure Maven resources to include specific file types like .jrxml, .html, .css, and .js.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.

question-bank-backed/src/main/resources/.general_idea: Replaced environment variable placeholders for database connection with hardcoded localhost credentials.
Changed JPA DDL auto strategy from 'update' to 'create-drop' for testing purposes.
Enabled SQL statement logging and formatting for debugging.
Added configuration properties for JWT authentication including secret and expiration.
Added specific logging level configurations for application and Spring components.
Configured server to include message and binding errors in error responses.
Added application metadata for Swagger UI display.
question-bank-backed/src/main/resources/.human_impl: app.name=Question Bank Management API app.description=A comprehensive API... app.version=1.0.0

question-bank-frontend/documentation/tut.general_idea: Update the HTML document title to reflect the specific application name instead of the generic template name.
Replace the template vendor name in the footer with the specific developer's name.

question-bank-frontend/package.json.general_idea: Reordered entries in the dependencies section to maintain alphabetical sorting.
Reordered entries in the devDependencies section to maintain alphabetical sorting.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.modul.general_idea: Import and register ReactiveFormsModule to support template-driven or reactive form handling in the application.
Import and register HttpClientModule to enable HTTP requests for backend communication.
Import and register FormsModule to support two-way data binding with ngModel.
Register the new GeneratePaperComponent in the module declarations to make it available for routing and usage.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/app.routi.general_idea: Update the default route and wildcard fallback to redirect to 'question' instead of 'dashboard'.
Correct the nesting and indentation of the AdminLayoutComponent route configuration to ensure valid Angular routing structure.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/layouts/a.general_idea: Import ReactiveFormsModule to enable template-driven or reactive form capabilities in the admin layout module.
Import HttpClientModule to enable HTTP requests within the admin layout module components.
Register ReactiveFormsModule in the module imports array to make reactive form directives available.
Register HttpClientModule in the module imports array to provide HttpClient services.
Added imports for new feature components (Subject, Chapter, Question, GeneratePaper) to the routing module.
Commented out existing dashboard and utility routes to disable them in the current configuration.
Replaced the placeholder UpgradeComponent with the actual SubjectComponent for the subject route.
Added a new route for generating papers based on a specific subject ID.
Replaced the placeholder UpgradeComponent with the actual ChapterComponent for the chapter route.
Replaced the placeholder UpgradeComponent with the actual QuestionComponent for the question route.
Added a dedicated route for the generate paper feature, currently pointing to QuestionComponent.

question-bank-frontend/src/app/pages/cha.general_idea: Replaced the initial placeholder text with the actual view chapter component to implement the page functionality.
